case_title: JACOB HENRY KAIZER-SALK VS. BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JACOB HENRY KAIZER-SALK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION, REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER CHATMAN IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL. NOTICE OF TODAY'S TRIAL DATE WAS MAILED TO ALL PARTIES ON JUNE 2, 2020. COURT HAS NOT RECEIVED ANY NOTIFICATION FROM PLAINTIFF RE: HIS NON-APPEARANCE. COURT INFORMS DEFENDANT THAT AN AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR HAS NOT BEEN FILED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
